items.title: Who could succeed Tim Cook as Apple CEO?
items.description: Apple (AAPL) is reportedly planning for CEO Tim Cook to retire, with the iPhone maker considering company insiders to lead the company. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley outlines two Apple insiders who could step up and assume the chief executive mantle. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
